hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "Worker agent completed. Next: run test-runner to verify implementation."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "Test-runner completed. Check results: if FAIL, invoke debugger. If PASS, proceed to review or next task."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "Code review completed. If CHANGES REQUESTED, invoke debugger. If APPROVED, mark task complete."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "Debugger completed fix. Re-run test-runner or reviewer to verify the fix."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "Security audit completed. If Critical/High issues found, invoke debugger to fix. If only Medium/Low, proceed to next step."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "Planning completed. Create tasks with TaskCreate and set dependencies with TaskUpdate(addBlockedBy)."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "Documentation completed. Next: run doc-keeper to process documentation drafts (Phase 3.5)."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "Doc-keeper completed. Present recommendations to user for approval. After that, run observer (Phase 3.75)."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "Observer completed. Save report and output final summary to user."}'
echo 'Destructive command detected. Verify this is intentional.' >&2; exit 2
